form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== lineNo[行号] paymentItemId[付款明细ID] invoiceItemId[发票明细ID] =========>amount[核销金额]====== settledAmountSource[核销金额(源币种)] settledAmountFunctional[核销金额(本位币)] =========>reference[业务关联]====== reconciliationId[核销单ID] =========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== lineNo[行号] paymentItemId[付款明细ID] invoiceItemId[发票明细ID] =========>amount[核销金额]====== settledAmountSource[核销金额(源币种)] settledAmountFunctional[核销金额(本位币)] =========>reference[业务关联]====== reconciliationId[核销单ID] remark[备注](2)

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: lineNo[行号] reconciliationId[核销单ID] paymentItemId[付款明细ID] invoiceItemId[发票明细ID]
